SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Our Dallas Electrical Experts

Founded in 2011, Horizon Electrical has been keeping Dallas homes safe and powered through scorching summers and unpredictable storms. Our team understands the unique electrical demands of Texas homes, from historic Tudors to modern high-rises.

We take pride in transparent pricing and meticulous workmanship, ensuring every outlet, panel, and fixture meets the highest safety standards. No job is too big or small for our licensed professionals.

As active members of the Dallas community, we support local schools and volunteer for weatherization projects to help neighbors stay safe during extreme weather.

14+ Years
850+ Projects
98% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Electrical

24/7 Emergency Service

When a storm knocks out power or a circuit fails at midnight, we're there—fast.

Local Code Masters

We know Dallas' specific electrical codes inside out, preventing costly rework.

Homeowner Education

Every job includes a walkthrough so you understand your system's health.

No Surprise Pricing

Upfront quotes with no hidden fees—just honest work at fair rates.

Schedule Your Electrical Safety Check Today

Call 555-ele-r90 for same-day service in Dallas and surrounding communities.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

After our 1962 Lake Highlands home kept tripping breakers every summer, Horizon replaced our rusted 60-amp panel in one day. They preserved our original midcentury look while bringing our system into the 21st century. Our AC hasn't strained once this July.

Marcus T. Panel Upgrade
“

When a Plano thunderstorm fried our smart home system last spring, Horizon installed surge protection that's already saved our fridge and TVs during two subsequent storms. Their explanation of how it works gave us real peace of mind.

Aisha B. Whole-Home Surge Protection
“

The team handled our 12' ceilings in the Bishop Arts District perfectly—no wobble at all even on high speed. They even matched the vintage brass switch plates we'd sourced from Round Top.

Carlos R. Ceiling Fan Installation
“

Our Preston Hollow garden looks like a magazine spread at night now. The path lights survived baseball-sized hail that destroyed our neighbor's cheap fixtures. Worth every penny.

Sophie K. Landscape Lighting
“

During the February ice storm, our Generac kicked on automatically and ran for 3 days straight. Horizon's team did the installation in December just in time—life savers!

James L. Standby Generator
“

When an outlet sparked behind our antique oak wainscoting in McKinney, Horizon had a tech out within 90 minutes. They found aluminum wiring degradation we never knew about and fixed it without damaging the historic trim.

Naomi W. Emergency Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if my panel needs upgrading?
If your breakers trip frequently or your home has original 1950s-70s wiring, it's time. We'll check for rust, buzzing sounds, or double-tapped breakers during our free assessment.
Will this disrupt my power for days?
Most panel swaps take 6-8 hours. We coordinate with Oncor to minimize downtime and can provide temporary power for medical equipment if needed.

Reach Out
